raw_consumer_statement:
The case with city bank ( card ) been created ( XXXX ID : XXXX ) for full compensation for stay in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( services been purchased via city travel and services provided not as advertised ). 

Amount of claim is {$950.00}, transaction date XX/XX/year>. In dispute resolution letter from citi bank the following reason been provided " Through our investigation, of the information and facts available, we were unable to identify or determine that a billing error occurred ''. 

I did not received any details on investigation performed and reply from hotel not been provided. Please assist with dispute processing.
